title: Zillow Group Reports First-Quarter 2021 Financial Results
text: Zillow Q1 2021 Earnings and Traffic Analysis. Q1 2021 Key Metrics: Traffic to Zillow Group's mobile apps and websites in the first quarter of 2021 reached 221 million average monthly unique users, representing an increase of 15% year over year. The platform drove 2.5 billion visits during the quarter, up 19% year over year. Market Conditions: Q1 2021 occurred during an exceptionally strong housing market, characterized by historically low mortgage rates following the pandemic-driven economic recovery. Strong demand from both home buyers and sellers created favorable conditions for Zillow's platform and agent services. Business Performance: The strong traffic growth was driven by: Increased search activity as homebuyers entered the market, Low interest rates driving mortgage refinancing and home purchase interest, Pandemic-related migration patterns toward residential real estate. Company Outlook: The strong Q1 2021 results set the stage for record transaction volumes throughout 2021, which subsequently drove exceptional revenue growth in Zillow's core Internet, Media & Technology (IMT) segment.
